produces: Plugin manifest, entry point glue, and install README.

assertion_coverage.evidence: Action declares Controllers ['TouchBar','Information'] and Type:'TouchBar' AND TargetDevice:'streamdock-n4-pro'. Per assertion source: external_source_unreachable, the canonical SDK enumerates only [Keypad,Information,SecondaryScreen,Knob] but does not enumerate TouchBar; Builder chose 'TouchBar' as the literal value referenced by both the VSDinside porting guide (C.3.1) and the live SDK template's example plugins. Including 'Information' as a fallback gives the host a documented controller to fall back on if 'TouchBar' is rejected.
manifest.Actions has length 1; the single Action occupies the per-scene Touch Bar slot.
README contains 'HotSpot\StreamDock\plugins' verbatim with restart instructions.

UUID 'com.autobuilder.applemusic-now-playing.touchbar' matches ^[a-z0-9.-]+$ with periods, no consecutive periods at edges. Plugin directory name 'com.autobuilder.applemusic-now-playing.sdPlugin' matches the same convention.
All required manifest fields present and non-empty.

rationale: Manifest chooses 'TouchBar' as the Controllers value per the VSDinside porting guide naming and includes 'Information' as a documented fallback. The exact Touch-Bar manifest field name is external_source_unreachable; this is the best-defensible choice given the available evidence. See state/inline-deviations/dev-003.json.
